title: scleranthus marginatus subsp. dichotomus
intro: Scleranthus marginatus subsp. dichotomus, also known as the forked knawel or forked buttonweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and calm the body and mind. The health benefits of Scleranthus marginatus subsp. dichotomus include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
